title: Juce's Useful Trims
description: A datapack that gives bonuses for armor trims
body:
With this ***beautiful***™ pack, I made it so that each trim of armor in the upcoming 1.20 update is capable of having a custom ability given to it when you apply a trim. It isn't quite set armor, as it applies even when you mix and mash. Though, if you do go all in on one, you might get a more potent version of the effect
All Trim Bonuses

Coast

- Gives the player regeneration in the rain. Regen I with one piece, II with two or three pieces, and regen III for all four pieces ![Coast Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067951273531428974/image.png)

Dune

- Gives the player saturation. Specifically, half a hunger bar every 20 seconds for one, with five seconds cut off for each piece ![Dune Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067950568615718932/image.png)

Eye

- Adds attack damage, giving +10% attack damage for each piece (linear, not compounding) ![Eye Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067951745487089704/image.png)

Rib

- Increases the rate of wither skeleton skull drops (around 10% chance to drop per level) ![Rib Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067952529389924382/image.png)

Sentry

- Gives the player knockback resistance equivalent to the netherite counterpart. For a tip, this means that you can take nearly no knockback with full netherite sentry armor ![Sentry Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067953205343957093/image.png)

Snout

- Decreases the time it takes nearby piglins to trade significantly ![Snout Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067957334732722316/image.png)

Spire

- Increases max health (half a heart per piece) ![Spire Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067958097282334731/image.png)

Tide

- Gives the player various ocean powers (replenishes every 30 seconds) ![Tide Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067953991167791186/image.png)

Vex

- Increases the user's attack speed slightly for each piece equipped ![Vex Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067954234470969437/image.png)

Ward

- Gives an additional half bar of protection with armor ![Ward Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067955167498092564/image.png)

Wild

- Random chance for the player to heal 2 hearts when they eat food (5% per piece of armor) ![Wild Trim Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067956009865318460/image.png)

I have also removed the recipe for the templates! Sorry, I felt that it would be OP when paired with these bonuses, hope that makes sense at least. And don't worry, I left the netherite one alone. If you want to be able to still dupe them, I recommend putting the 1.20 update snapshot datapack just above this one and that should fix it well and good for you ![Removed Trim Recipe Preview](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/514848853678096384/1067958468843159552/image.png)
